notes: artifact_download.rs (5): anyhow context strings consumed by log::warn! sink, not directly displayed (toast uses a separate fixed string) → telemetry_payload. toolbar_item.rs (6): display_label() — UI control labels rendered via ControlItemRenderer → translate (FastForward, ModelSelector, FileExplorer, etc). llms.rs: tooltip_text (lines 69,70,72,74,75) → UI tooltips → translate; line 388 .expect → panic_message; lines 1082,1100 report_error! → telemetry_payload. create_project_view.rs (6): GlowingEditor placeholder + BuildSuggestion prompts shown in UI → translate. claude.rs (7): line 115 push_str into PluginInstallError.log (log field — detailed log file) → telemetry_payload; lines 125,129,183,184,213 are PluginInstructions/success messages rendered in UI → translate. workspace/action.rs (8): LoginGatedFeature strings consumed only as TelemetryEvent dimensions, never displayed → telemetry_payload. hoa_onboarding_flow.rs (6): all callout titles/descriptions/buttons → translate. x11/mouse.rs (8): format!() error strings returned via Result<(), String> propagating into computer_use agent error path (no UI sink) → telemetry_payload. warpui_core/core/app.rs (10): all .expect() panic-style assertion strings → panic_message.
